response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong general software engineering fundamentals with 14+ years of experience across required languages and multiple staff-level roles at scale, the resume lacks critical domain expertise in experimentation platforms, metrics infrastructure, and data-driven systems—core responsibilities for this Principal role. No evidence of designing A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or experimentation measurement platforms that would be used across multiple teams.
strengths: 14+ years of progressive technical experience with all required programming languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, C++, C#, Java) and multiple staff-level roles demonstrating technical depth
Proven production-scale experience including handling millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby and millions of annual transactions at Optilyz
Strong commitment to software craftsmanship evidenced by TDD practice, mentoring, testable design, and community engagement through talks and open-source projects
concerns: No demonstrated experience building or architecting experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, or feature flagging systems—central to this role's core responsibilities
Missing critical expertise in metrics infrastructure, telemetry systems, statistical analysis, and experimentation quality or bias detection required for growth engineering
Limited evidence of multi-region or globally distributed systems design; recent roles focused on product optimization and agent infrastructure rather than platform-level measurement systems

key_factors.factor: Strong core engineering fundamentals and production-scale background
No demonstrated metrics and data analysis infrastructure experience
